title: Enterprise IT: endpoint vulnerability patching
pain_description: CVEs pile up; ticket storm monthly; patches delayed; breaches happen.
santifer_pattern: CVE + asset + LLM-prioritize + auto-patch + rollback

title: SIEM alert fatigue + playbook execution
pain_description: Thousands of alerts daily; 95% noise; analysts quit.
santifer_pattern: Alert + context + LLM triage + auto-run playbooks + escalate

title: Phishing email investigation + response
pain_description: User reports suspicious email; analyst investigates headers + URLs; slow.
santifer_pattern: User report + LLM context + sandbox + verdict + auto-quarantine

title: Cloud cost optimization: stale resources everywhere
pain_description: Unused EBS, over-provisioned RDS, idle EC2; bills shock; no ownership.
santifer_pattern: Usage + tag + LLM recommender + auto-terminate with guardrails

title: Kubernetes resource rightsizing
pain_description: Over-provisioned pods 2-5x; HPA + VPA require expertise.
santifer_pattern: Metrics + LLM optimizer + PR-gated rollout + monitoring

title: Post-mortem writing + action-item tracking
pain_description: After incident: timeline + root cause + actions + share. Days of writing.
santifer_pattern: Chat+alert timeline + LLM narrative + 5-whys + action-item tracker

title: SaaS management + license reclamation
pain_description: 200 SaaS apps, 40% seats unused, zombie spend; offboarding leaks.
santifer_pattern: SSO + billing + usage + LLM reclaim action + owner outreach

title: Data catalog / lineage auto-generation
pain_description: Data consumers hunt for correct table; lineage unclear; bad decisions.
santifer_pattern: Warehouse + query logs + LLM lineage + semantic descriptions

title: ETL breakage + pipeline debugging
pain_description: Pipeline fails in middle of night; on-call diagnoses; hours lost.
santifer_pattern: Failure + schema diff + LLM root-cause + auto-retry

title: Semantic layer for BI self-service
pain_description: BI dashboards = analyst bottleneck; NL-to-SQL a dream.
santifer_pattern: Warehouse + semantic + LLM NL-to-SQL + chart gen

title: Gaming: player churn + reactivation
persona: Live-ops / CRM at mobile gaming studio
pain_description: Big spenders drift; generic push doesn't re-engage; LTV drops.
santifer_pattern: Behavior + LLM-personalized offer + channel + measurement

title: Gaming: UGC moderation + toxicity
pain_description: Chat + voice toxicity; reports queue; kids at risk.
santifer_pattern: Voice + text + context + severity + auto-ban + escalate

title: Game dev QA: asset + lore consistency
pain_description: Hundreds of NPCs + quests; lore contradicts; patches regress.
santifer_pattern: Lore bible + diff + LLM consistency + regression flag

title: Creator economy: brand deal management
pain_description: Brand pitches, contracts, deliverables, payments — all DMs + PDFs.
santifer_pattern: Pitch inbox + contract gen + deliverable tracker + payment

title: Twitch / YouTube: clip + shorts creation from streams
pain_description: 8-hour stream → 10 clips? Editing kills time.
santifer_pattern: Stream + highlight detection + clip + vertical reframe + publish

title: Solo app developer: ASO + store-listing optimization
pain_description: Keywords, screenshots, creatives — science unlearned; rankings collapse.
santifer_pattern: Keyword research + LLM title/desc + screenshot variant tester

title: Patreon / OnlyFans / subscription creator churn
pain_description: Fans drift; creator lacks CRM; renewals drop.
santifer_pattern: Fan CRM + churn signals + personalized DM agent

title: Agency-side influencer campaign reporting
pain_description: End-of-campaign deck per client; posts + metrics + screenshots manual.
santifer_pattern: Metrics pull + LLM narrative + auto-deck

title: Climate / CSRD carbon accounting for mid-market
pain_description: Scope 1/2/3 Excel hell; supplier data spotty; disclosure looming.
santifer_pattern: Expense + utility + travel + supplier → carbon calc + disclosure

title: ESG supply-chain due diligence (CSDDD, UFLPA)
pain_description: CSDDD/UFLPA require tier-N supplier mapping; forced-labor evidence; fines heavy.
santifer_pattern: Supplier graph + news + audit docs + LLM risk report

title: Solar installer operations: permits + interconnection
pain_description: Permit + utility interconnect + HOA + financing — 30+ steps/project.
santifer_pattern: Address + permit/interconnect APIs + doc generator + status tracker

title: EV fleet charging scheduling + utility rebates
pain_description: Charge schedules + utility TOU rates + rebate filings — fleet manager overwhelmed.
santifer_pattern: Fleet + utility rates + rebate programs + optimizer + filer

title: Building energy + decarbonization audits (Local Law 97)
pain_description: Local Law 97 fines; energy benchmarking + retrofit planning complex.
santifer_pattern: Bldg data + code + retrofit recommender + filing

title: Carbon credit registry integrity + MRV
pain_description: MRV (measurement-reporting-verification) expensive; buyers question credit quality.
santifer_pattern: Satellite + sensor + LLM verification narrative + registry push

title: Recycled materials traceability
pain_description: Recycled content claims under scrutiny; traceability to bales manual.
santifer_pattern: Batch IDs + supplier chain + LLM narrative + audit pack

title: Employee expense carbon attribution
pain_description: Corporate travel + commute + spend = scope 3 majority; categorization manual.
santifer_pattern: Expense + LLM categorizer + emission-factor DB + report

title: Wildfire / flood insurance risk per property
pain_description: Carriers retreating markets; homeowners blind to risk.
santifer_pattern: Address + sat + climate model + risk + mitigation recommender

title: Power grid interconnection queue for renewables
pain_description: 5-7 year interconnection queues; studies + ISO docs + cost allocation manual.
santifer_pattern: Queue intel + study parser + risk scoring + ISO-filing agent

title: Climate tech VC sourcing for regional funds
pain_description: Thousands of LinkedIn founders; manually track fundraising signals + stage; miss rounds.
santifer_pattern: Founder+signal ingest + climate-taxonomy + LLM fit score + outreach

title: Public sector RFP monitoring + bidding
pain_description: SAM.gov + state/city RFPs flood; hand-tracking = missed bids.
santifer_pattern: RFP ingest + fit scorer + past-proposal RAG + draft agent

title: Local government 311 triage
pain_description: Pothole, trash, noise — millions of 311 calls; triage manual; SLAs miss.
santifer_pattern: Voice + photo + geo + LLM classifier + dispatch

title: Public benefits eligibility navigation (SNAP, TANF, Medicaid)
pain_description: Complex eligibility + paper apps + language barriers; $40B+ unclaimed.
santifer_pattern: Multilingual voice intake + state rules + application agent

title: K-12 district procurement + grant tracking
pain_description: Title I + IDEA grants; state reports; procurement rules strict.
santifer_pattern: Grant calendar + report drafter + procurement rule engine

title: Higher ed financial aid appeals + processing
pain_description: Appeals pile; students drop; FA officers overworked.
santifer_pattern: Appeal intake + policy RAG + doc check + decision drafter

title: Research grant management (NIH, NSF)
pain_description: Progress reports + effort reporting + subaward monitoring; PI time wasted.
santifer_pattern: Milestone agent + reports drafter + subaward tracker

title: Scientific literature summarization for R&D
pain_description: Stay on top of papers; competitive intel lost.
santifer_pattern: Topic + source feed + LLM summary + memo

title: Biotech lab notebook → patent disclosure
pain_description: PI notebooks disorganized; prior art search + disclosure take weeks.
santifer_pattern: Notebook + prior-art RAG + disclosure drafter

title: Utility meter reading + billing dispute
pain_description: Consumer disputes monthly bill; CS burns time explaining tariff.
santifer_pattern: Bill + usage + LLM explainer + dispute workflow

title: Insurance first-notice-of-loss (FNOL) intake
pain_description: Customer calls after accident; stressful; missing info delays adjuster.
santifer_pattern: Voice + photo + policy lookup + adjuster handoff

title: Insurance subrogation recovery
pain_description: Carrier pays claim; sues at-fault party for recovery; docs + negotiation manual.
santifer_pattern: Claim + police/repair + carrier lookup + demand letter + follow-up

title: Workers comp: return-to-work coordination
pain_description: Injured worker + MD + employer + TPA + attorney — coordination fails.
santifer_pattern: Care team SSOT + stakeholder agent + doc exchange + RTW tracker

title: Commercial lease abstracting
pain_description: Lease docs 50-100 pages; key terms (CAM, escalations, renewals) extracted manually.
santifer_pattern: Lease PDF + LLM extractor + audit + CRE-system push

title: SaaS contract redline: customer side
pain_description: Vendor MSAs arrive; buyer's legal bottleneck; procurement cycle stalls.
santifer_pattern: Buyer playbook + LLM redliner + escalation flow

title: Real estate investor: rent roll + NOI reconciliation
pain_description: Property manager reports come monthly; NOI vs. proforma drift unclear.
santifer_pattern: T-12 + proforma + LLM variance commentary + alert agent

title: Franchise operator multi-location ops
pain_description: Brand standards audits + P&L per unit + labor comp; each unit has own manager.
santifer_pattern: Unit SSOT + audit checklist + LLM benchmark + alerts

title: QSR drive-thru voice ordering
pain_description: Drive-thru accuracy 85%; voice AI pilots mixed; labor shortages force adoption.
santifer_pattern: Voice + menu + POS + drive-thru confirmation

title: University admissions essay review
pain_description: Essays need individualized feedback; college counselors backed up.
santifer_pattern: Student profile + target college + LLM feedback + counselor review

title: Supply chain: demurrage + detention dispute
pain_description: Carriers charge D&D; fighting charges requires docs + timing evidence.
santifer_pattern: Timeline stitcher + LLM dispute-letter + carrier portal agent

title: Contract manufacturer quality + spec mgmt
pain_description: Specs drift between factories; QC reports paper; defect escapes to customer.
santifer_pattern: Spec SSOT + CM portal + CV defect detection + corrective action

title: Global M&A integration PMO (100-day plan)
pain_description: 100-day plan = thousands of workstreams; integration always late.
santifer_pattern: Workstream SSOT + dependency graph + risk agent + exec digest
